name: Suspicious Fsutil Invocation
description: Detects suspicious invocations of the 'fsutil' command, often used by attackers to manipulate the file system, including deleting or creating the USN journal.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: process_guid
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the process.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The path to the executable image (fsutil.exe).

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line arguments, including 'deletejournal' or 'createjournal'.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the 'fsutil' command was executed.

parameters.name: parent_process_name
parameters.description: The name of the parent process that invoked 'fsutil.exe'.

parameters.name: original_file_name
parameters.description: The original file name of the executable (fsutil.exe).
